libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For the 5.0.1 native test run, preserve/apply the nativeTest runtime system properties used for the 5.0.0 scaffold: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Keep coverage self-contained with a local Vert.x HttpServer on 127.0.0.1; avoid external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing guard is version-pinned to 5.0.0, so generated 5.0.1 tests may omit the Java 25 native runtime flags unless the condition is updated.
OAuth2WebClient APIs reference the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency; avoid OAuth2-specific tests unless that optional dependency is intentionally added.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves through vertx-core 5.0.1 to Netty 4.2.2.Final, and the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already documents that Vert.x 5 / Netty 4.2 needs explicit unsafe-access runtime flags for Java 25 native runs. No extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for normal WebClient coverage.
